case_title: CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT BERGGREN VS. TRANS UNION LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (DANIELLE NOWLIN ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE: (1) DEFAMATION, (2) NEGLIGENT ENABLEMENT OF IDENTITY FRAUD; AND (3) ANY VIOLATION OF THE FAIR DEBT COLLECTION PRACTICES ACT (15USCA 1692 ET SEG.) A PLAINTIFF IN A SMALL CLAIMS ACTION SHALL HAVE NO RIGHT TO APPEAL THE JUDGMENT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 116.710(A). THIS JUDGMENT IS CONCLUSIVE ON THE PLAINTIFF, WHO HAS NO RIGHT TO APPEAL AN ADVERSE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DANIELLE NOWLIN TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT - TRANS UNION LLC FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (DANIELLE NOWLIN ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC);HEARING: 4/18/23 AT 10:00AM (ZOOM REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-06-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2023 BY GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT BERGGREN IS PRESENT AND WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JPT. DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE NOWLIN, SENIOR ANALYST. THE COURT FINDS THAT THIS VENUE IS THE COMPETENT JURISDICTION TO HEAR THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
